data.title: Why Did Cracker Barrel Stock (CBRL) Rise Overnight?
data.description: Cracker Barrel Old Country Store Inc. stock (NASDAQ: CBRL) saw an 8.02% increase in after-hours trading, reaching $33.08 following the release of its fiscal second-quarter 2026 results. The company reported a total revenue of $874.8 million, marking a 7.9% decrease compared to the previous year and slightly below the expected $876.94 million. Comparable restaurant store sales, which monitor locations open for a minimum of six full quarters, were down by 7.1%, while comparable retail store sales, assessing revenue from locations open for at least six full quarters prior to the reported fiscal quarter, fell by 9.2%. The net income according to generally accepted accounting principles was $1.3 million, a considerable decline from $22.2 million in the previous year. Adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization for the second quarter were $38.2 million, a drop from $74.6 million during the same period in the prior year. Adjusted earnings per share stood at $0.25, surpassing expectations. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CMS(867.HK/8A8.SG): Self-Developed INHBE-Targeting siRNA Drug Received IND Approval for Overweight/Obesity
data.description: In Shenzhen, China, on March 5, 2026, China Medical System Holdings Limited shared that their innovative drug CMS-D008 injection, targeting INHBE with small nucleic acid, has been granted Drug Clinical Trial Approval Notice by the National Medical Products Administration on March 4, 2026. The NMPA has authorized clinical trials for CMS-D008 injection for overweight or obese individuals.

data.title: Trifork launches Synq to reduce costly equipment downtime with remote maintenance and repair
data.description: Trifork has unveiled Synq, its latest innovation aimed at minimizing expensive equipment downtime through remote maintenance and repair services. The cutting-edge solution offers a proactive approach to addressing issues promptly, ultimately reducing costs associated with machinery inactivity. With Synq, businesses can achieve substantial savings by eliminating the need for on-site interventions, resulting in an approximate 30% decrease in maintenance expenses. This revolutionary offering is set to revolutionize the industry by streamlining processes and maximizing productivity levels.

data.title: HM Hospitals and Huawei Jointly Launch a Global Smart Healthcare Showcase
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 5, 2026, Huawei organized a summit at MWC Barcelona 2026 with the theme "AI+, Accelerating Healthcare Intelligence." The summit brought together prominent healthcare experts, academics, and industry partners from around the world to discuss the advancement of digital and intelligent healthcare.

data.title: Peregrine Advisors Served as Sole Advisor on Century Mechanical Holdings Acquisition of Weston Trawick
data.description: On March 4, 2026, Peregrine Advisors from Irvine, California, revealed that they acted as the sole M&A advisor in the purchase of Weston Trawick, an electrical services provider located in Northern Florida, by Century Mechanical Holdings, a company that specializes in various mechanical services. This acquisition marks an important development in the industry as it represents the consolidation of expertise and resources in the market. The merger is anticipated to enhance the overall offering of Century Mechanical Holdings and enable them to expand their reach and service capabilities.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Huawei/
data.description: Huawei recently hosted the 4th Digital Economy Development Forum, as announced in a news release on 03-Mar-2026. The forum marked an important milestone in advancing digital economies globally. The event saw participation from over 500 industry professionals and experts, with discussions focusing on key trends and challenges in the digital sector. During the forum, it was emphasized that digital transformation is critical for economic growth, with projections indicating that digital economies could contribute up to $23 trillion to global GDP by 2025. Huawei highlighted the need for collaboration and innovation to harness the full potential of digital technologies. The company also encouraged attendees to visit their website for more information on the forum and related initiatives.

data.title: Türk Telekom and ZTE Complete World's First C+L Full-Band Integrated 1.6Tbps Live Network Trial, Ushering in A New Era of 5G All-Optical Network
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain on March 5, 2026, ZTE Corporation (0763.HK / 000063.SZ) and Türk Telekom achieved a milestone by successfully implementing the world's inaugural C+L (12 THz) full-band integrated 1.6Tbps live network. ZTE is a prominent global supplier of comprehensive information and communication technology solutions. This groundbreaking accomplishment signals a significant advancement in telecommunications technology, showcasing the potential to revolutionize data transmission capabilities.

data.title: Capgemini and McDonald's renew their strategic partnership with a global multi-year agreement focused on delivering modern, scalable platforms
data.description: Capgemini has recently revealed a significant development regarding its partnership with McDonald’s Corporation. The two companies have agreed to extend their strategic collaboration by five years. This extension emphasizes their commitment to supporting modern and scalable platforms catering to various guest needs. This ongoing partnership highlights a long-term dedication to enhancing services and experiences.
